generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor for position angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox for position angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models and component simulations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for gearwheel component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for cycloidal gearbox component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeAnalysisService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDynamicsInsight, DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time analysis for improving robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance FrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics used to adjust control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulated and measured data for friction model identification"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system state and friction dynamics"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms based on friction model identification and deviation analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel with output torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox with output torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller driving the system"
]

instance RobotSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining tasks with 0.06 mm path repeatability and 2 m functional reach"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; the digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization with sensor data streams via MQTT, enabling immediate feedback for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow comprising data traces linked to engineering, simulation, and data calculation models via processing components, with integrated visualization in a unified dashboard for real-time monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying application conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to assess model accuracy and identify friction-related deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset management, SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
